## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and PubNub to explore potential collaboration opportunities in AI-driven content creation and growth strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a unique blend of AI-powered content creation and human expertise to drive organic growth and AI visibility for tech companies](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [PubNub is interested in innovative ways to boost inbound developer interest and explore AI/agentic initiatives for their real-time data synchronization platform](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Both companies see potential synergies in their approaches to AI and content strategy, with a focus on quality and audience understanding](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

## Topics

### PubNub's Business and Interests

  - [Global network for real-time data synchronization, powering 800M devices with 3T transactions/month](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=159.0)
  - [Seeking innovative ways to grow inbound developer interest and explore AI initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Interested in understanding agentic workflows and potential collaborations in this space](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### GrowthX's Offering and Approach

  - [Combines AI-powered content creation with human expertise to drive organic growth](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Focuses on understanding audience deeply, creating high-quality content, and optimizing for AI visibility](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Offers 8-week strategy sprint ($20K) followed by ongoing daily content publication and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)

### Content Strategy and AI Visibility

  - [Emphasis on creating high-value content that resonates with the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Strategies to improve visibility in AI-generated answers and search results](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Balancing organic traffic growth with conversion-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)

### Business Model and Pricing

  - [Service-based model with software platform support](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=937.0)
  - [Initial 8-week strategy and execution sprint, followed by recurring engagements](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1613.0)
  - [Pricing based on scope and volume of work, with potential for multiple work streams](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1621.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send follow-up information and potentially schedule a deeper dive after Joshua's marketing team offsite](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1746.0)
  - [Marcel to introduce Todd to GrowthX's CTO for discussions on agent-based workflows](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1802.0)
  - [Potential future discussion on Sapphire Ventures (as a potential investor for GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=46.0)
  - [PubNub to consider GrowthX's offering as part of their upcoming marketing strategy planning](https://fathom.video/share/3Sv_Re5p8yE9z99WtXYrfuZNL--ii7R5?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
